---
title: 'Ptolemy: Architecture Support for Robust Deep Learning'
author:
- Yiming Gan
- Yuxian Qiu
- Jingwen Leng
- Minyi Guo
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/micro20-ptolemy.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/horizonlab/ptolemy-architecture-support-for-robust-deep-learning-7c87e1b7-e956-43c5-9465-b9c0ae5c715d
code_source: https://github.com/Ptolemy-dl/Ptolemy
journ: MICRO
year: 2020
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 43
---
